behavioral_stage.sub_stage_definition: High enthusiasm, confidence, and belief that success is easily achievable. Energy is high and challenges feel exciting rather than threatening.

employee_questionnaire.question_text: You feel enthusiastic about your current role or responsibilities, believing you can make a big impact.
You are excited to bring new ideas or approaches into your work environment.
You feel motivated to take on challenges with confidence that you’ll succeed.
You believe anything is possible in your current role.

strengths.description: Displays strong motivation, enthusiasm, and willingness to engage.

weaknesses.description: May underestimate complexity or effort required for sustained success.

opportunities.description: Can convert enthusiasm into learning and early wins.

threats.description: High excitement may lead to taking on too much too fast.

recommended_actions.recommendation: Break ambitious goals into realistic milestones.
